title: Arcana Mastery
summary: Arcana separates ritual control from raw channeling. It is a multiplier across other skills — not a standalone damage class. Each unlock teaches the underlying magical framework through play.

thresholds.title: Arcane Awareness
thresholds.description: Choose how you approach hidden forces.

thresholds.title: Ether Practice
thresholds.description: Your arcane approach becomes more stable.

thresholds.title: Archmage Path
thresholds.description: Late thresholds support committed cross-skill arcane specialization.

nodes.title: Ritual Geometry
nodes.description: Favors careful control, setup, and magical stability.

nodes.title: Wild Channeling
nodes.description: Favors raw throughput and forceful arcane output.

nodes.title: Sigil Memory
nodes.description: Deepens ritual magic into layered preparation and magical craft bonuses.

nodes.title: Surging Current
nodes.description: Deepens channeling into more forceful arcane commitment.

nodes.title: Sealed Circuit
nodes.description: Commits to disciplined ritual control, reducing magical damage taken.

nodes.title: Stormcasting
nodes.description: Commits to forceful channeling — heightened output when empowered.
